# Applio

> Applio is a free, AI-powered resume builder that helps job seekers create ATS-optimized resumes that pass automated applicant-tracking filters and land more interviews.

## What Applio does
- Build resumes from 16 professional, fully customizable templates (fonts, colors, spacing, sections), including Harvard, Stanford, and Jake's Resume styles.
- AI Tailoring: paste any job description and Applio rewrites your bullets and summary to match the role — grounded only in your real experience, never fabricated.
- ATS Score: scores your resume against a job description and lists concrete fixes.
- AI Resume Analysis: strengths, weaknesses, and the highest-impact changes.
- AI Interview Prep: role-specific practice questions plus AI feedback on your answers.
- Career Coach: an AI assistant that knows your resume and helps with rewrites, tailoring, interviews, job strategy, and cover letters.
- One-click export to PDF, HTML, or TXT, plus a built-in job-application tracker.

## Free tools (no sign-up)
- Free ATS Resume Checker (https://appliohq.com/ats-checker): paste a résumé and job description for an instant ATS score, matched and missing keywords, and concrete fixes.

## Pricing
- Free forever: full resume builder, all 16 templates, job tracker, AI Interview Prep, and 10 PDF downloads — no credit card required.
- Premium ($9.99/month): everything in Free plus unlimited downloads and all AI features (AI Improve, Tailor to Job, ATS Check, Resume Analysis).
- Lifetime ($39.99 one-time): all Premium features, paid once and used forever.

## Key facts
- What ATS means: an Applicant Tracking System collects, parses, and ranks resumes before a recruiter reviews them. It does not auto-reject applications (most are still reviewed by a person), but resumes that miss a job's keywords or use formatting the software can't parse rank lower and are less likely to be seen. Applio scores a resume against the ATS rubric and lists specific fixes.
- Myth check: the widely repeated "75% of resumes are auto-rejected by ATS" claim is not supported by evidence; it traces to a 2012 sales pitch from a company that shut down in 2013. Applio's guidance reflects how ATS actually works.
- Free to start; no credit card required.
- Privacy: passwords hashed (PBKDF2-SHA256); resume data encrypted in transit and at rest; payments handled by Stripe.
